specification: The name of a PetriNet must only contain alphabetic characters, digits, or underscores, and must start with an alphabetic character or an underscore.
The name of a place must start with a letter or underscore, followed by any combination of letters, digits, or underscores.
The number of tokens at a place should be zero or positive.
The name of a transition must match the pattern where it starts with a letter or underscore, followed by any number of letters, digits, or underscores.
The predecessor and successor of an arc must not be the same.

ocl: context Arc inv: (self.predecessor.oclIsKindOf(Place) and self.successor.oclIsKindOf(Transition) or (self.predecessor.oclIsKindOf(Transition) and self.successor.oclIsKindOf(Place)))
specification: An arc should connect either a place to a transition or a transition to a place, but not entities of the same type.
The weight of an arc must be greater than or equal to 1.
